channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fallen tree blocking path, 24th June
item.description:
On Burrows Field. Please could it be moved - thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peregrine Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stones & gravel all over Road and pavement., 24th June
item.description:
Following the “blitz” by several street cleaning vehicles in Nine Elms Road and Liddington Road area, the roads and pavements are now covered with stones/gravel which presents a danger to cyclists and less mobile pedestrians.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nine Elms Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gl504bl, 24th June
item.description:
Numerous potholes outside number 24 grandville street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Granville Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disabled bay outside 5 Tivoli Street, 24th June
item.description:
Hi, I live on Tivoli Street and parking is a struggle a lot of the time. I'm aware the disabled bay marked outside 5 Tivoli Street is rarely used. Whilst the resident may qualify for a disabled bay outside their property, I don't believe they have/use a car personally. I understand that disabled bays aren't permitted for visitors or carers and as such if the resident doesn't have/use a car I feel that this disabled space should be removed to ease the availability of parking on the street for all residents.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Tivoli Street, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 24th June
item.description:
FixMyStreet ref: 9669399. The silver birch tree has died
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 24th June
item.description:
Wonky & Faded Give Way Sign - Assess and replace faded give way sign. Replace with like-for-like size.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
3 months Give and take plus temporary footway closure please cut back overgrown tree and ivy growing over lamp column although it is not visible NOTE there are birds nesting in their approx 5 meters high and 1 meter wide as located by customer (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet
